blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,976 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.9" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
